name: get
_note: lore.get resolves a single authored event by id from the file-backed canon (lib/authored-lore.js). A missing id → ok:false missing_id; an unknown id → ok:false unknown_event (NOT no_db — the corpus is file-backed). On success the event has hidden_truth stripped (author-only invariant). The empty-input {} case is intentionally ok:false here because id is required — this is a single-record lookup, not a list read.
